**Black Forest Labs — Funding & History**  Black Forest Labs was formally incorporated in March 2024 in Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany, by a group of researchers who had previously built the core generative-media stack at Stability AI. Co-founders Robin Rombach (CEO), Patrick Esser, Andreas Blattmann, and Dominik Lorenz were the principal authors of the Stable Diffusion paper and the architectural

**Phase 1 Deadlines (February 2025)**  The first wave of enforceable obligations under the AI Act takes effect on **2 February 2025**, six months after the regulation entered into force. From this date, the use of “prohibited” or unacceptable-risk AI practices is banned outright across the EU, and national regulators gain authority to levy fines for non-compliance.
